oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Commercial Members
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Staff, AFA Watchbird
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 51 Number 2 (April/May 2024).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.ABC Animal and Bird Sugar Land, TX avndr1@gmail.com https://myabcvet.com/ ABC Birds Humble , TX bjwbird@abcirds.com https://abcbirds.com American Bird Bands Randallstown, MD bemorebirds@gmail.com https://americanbirdbands.com/ Arizona Bird Store Mesa, AZ Debbie@azbirdstore.com https://azbirdstore.com Avalon Aviary, LLC Loveland, CO avalonstore@frii.com http://avalonaviary.com/ Avian Resources San Dimas, CA steve@avianresources.com Bird Fever Indianapolis, IN bluebirdaviary7823@gmail.com http://birdfever.com Bird Jewelry by Dawn Eagle Point, ORbirdjewelrybydawn@gmail.com http://birdjewelry.com Birdlady’s Babes Atascadero, CA tanibirdlady@gmail.com Birds Unlimited Webster, NY brdsunltd2@aol.com http://www.birdsunltd.com BirdSupplies.com Inc. Castle Rock, CO birdsupplies@gmail.com www.birdsupplies.com Bonka Bird Toys Fort Lauderdale, FL sales@bonkabirdtoys.com https://bonkabirdtoys.com CDE Animal Cages Omaha, NE shawn@cdecages.com http://www.cdecages.com Center for Birds & Exotic Animal Medicine Bothell, WA https://theexoticvet.com Chatterbox Parrots LLC Denham Springs, LA chatterboxparrots@gmail.comhttps://www.chatterboxparrots.com Corners Limited Inc. Kalamazoo, MI sales@cornerslimited.com www.cornerslimited.com David Garcia Law Homestead, FL david@davidgarcialaw.com Edwards Exotics Liberty Hill, TX cliff@edwardsexotics.com http://edwardsexotics.com For the Birds of Acadiana Lafayette, LA forthebirdsofacadiana@gmail.com https://www.forthebirdsofacadiana.com Hagen Avicultural Research Institute Mansfield, MA melanie.allen@rchagen.com https://hari.ca/hari/ Higgins Premium Pet Foods Miami, FL tsaati@higginspremium.com http://www.higginspremium.comClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
